source_intake_record.raw_question_text: Consider the feedback system shown in <image>. The Nyquist plot of \( G(s) \) is also shown. Which one of the following conclusions is correct?
source_intake_record.raw_answer_text: The closed-loop system is unstable for sufficiently large and positive \( k \)

choice_map.B: \( G(s) \) is a strictly proper transfer function
choice_map.C: \( G(s) \) is a stable and minimum phase transfer function
choice_map.D: The closed-loop system is unstable for sufficiently large and positive \( k \)
